[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111111111 a
1 111111111 a
2 111111111 a
3 111111111 a
4 111111111 a
5 100111111 7
6 011011011 6
7 111111101 8

01 10 111101110 7
12 21 110101111 7
23 32 010001011 4
34 43 111001101 6
45 54 111011111 8
56 65 111111011 8
67 76 111111101 8 match 7
70 07 111101101 7

02 20 111101011 7
13 31 110101111 7
24 42 111001111 7
35 53 111011011 7
46 64 111111100 7
57 75 111111111 a match 0 1 2 3 4
60 06 111111000 6
71 17 111101111 8

47 74 111101101 7
50 05 111111011 8
61 16 100111110 6
72 27 011101111 7

04 40 111101100 6
15 51 111111111 a match 0 1 2 3 4
26 62 110111011 7
37 73 011101101 6
